zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Hill於1428年出生在英國薩默塞特豪德斯同時，他的父親John Hill27歲，母親Cecily Stourton27歲。他於1470年與Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton在英國爾維布波瑞結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1493年9月8日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特斯帕斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Hill于1428年出生在英国薩默塞特豪德斯同时，他的父亲John Hill27岁，母亲Cecily Stourton27岁。他于1470年与Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton在英国爾維布波瑞结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1493年9月8日在英国英格兰薩默塞特斯帕斯頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特斯帕斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Hill was born in 1428, in Houndstone, Somerset, England, his father, John Hill, was 27 and his mother, Cecily Stourton, was 27. He married Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton in 1470, in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 September 1493, in Spaxton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 65, and was buried in Spaxton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Hill est né en 1428, à Houndstone, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Hill, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cecily Stourton, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton en 1470, à Wybunbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1493, à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Spaxton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Hill 1428 in Houndstone, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hill 27 und seine Mutter Cecily Stourton 27. Er hat 1470 in Wybunbury, Cheshire, England Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1493 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Spaxton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Spaxton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Hill è nato il nel 1428 nel Houndstone, Somerset, England, il suo padre, John Hill, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Stourton, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton nel 1470, nel Wybunbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1493, nel Spaxton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Spaxton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Hillが1428年にイギリスソメルセトホーウンドストーンで生まれた時，父John Hillは27歳，母Cecily Stourtonは27歳であった。1470年にイギリスチェシュアイアウイブンブリーでLady Alice Wood of Spaxtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1493年9月8日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトスプアクストンで65歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトスプアクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Hill(이)가 1428년 영국 서머세트 허운드스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hill(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Stourton(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1470년 영국 체실르 윈이버버이에서 Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1493년 9월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 스파스턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 스파스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Hill nasceu em 1428, em Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hill, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Stourton, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton em 1470, em Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1493, em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Hill родился в 1428 г. в местности хоундстоун, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hill было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Stourton, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton в 1470 г. в местности вибунбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 сентября 1493 г. в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности спакстон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Hill nació en 1428, en Houndstone, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hill, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Cecily Stourton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Wood of Spaxton en 1470, en Wybunbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1493, en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Spaxton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
